method_summary: Demonstrates a single neuron perceptron optical neural network using 49 wavelengths for synapses, achieving 11.9 GigaOPS at 8 bits per operation.
key_innovation: Using a microcomb for optical neural networks that can reach ultrahigh speeds.
title: Single perceptron at 12 GigaOPs based on a microcomb for versatile, high-speed scalable, optical neural networks
